subcodes.first_line: O thou who art advanced toward the Kingdom! Thy letter was received and its contents created joy, for it showed thy faith and assurance.
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
